meta.purpose: Incremental PL Athlete Research run for 2026 Numata Bench Press roster. This file records a narrow promotion-readiness audit without touching print layout or broad data files.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Only official/high-trust source-backed rows with stable identity evidence may be promoted to data/database.json. Ambiguous identity remains in data/research-candidates.json or isolated research logs.

batchScope.reasonForSmallBatch: Focused reconciliation of a previously logged Lot 15 prior-history candidate before any database promotion.
batchScope.openPrCheck: Open PR check found only PR #111, a non-overlapping completion report generator. No athlete database, research-candidate, or A4 layout PR conflict was found.
batchScope.mainBranchDuplicateCheck: No existing data/research-batches/2026-07-02-lot15-matsubara-promotion-readiness-run64.json was present on main before creation. Existing Lot 11-15 run4 log was reused as prior evidence and not duplicated.

Same bodyweight class context: 66kg-class Numata classic bench and 66kg-class Spring Ebetsu classic powerlifting.

notPromotedThisRun.reason: The confirmed prior row is ready, but data/database.json is a minified one-line master file. This run avoids broad rewrite risk and adds a narrow audit file only.
notPromotedThisRun.safeNextStep: Promote this single 2026-04-25 CL-PL row into A-15-matsubara-miki histories using the established database history schema in a separate schema-focused PR.
